skills.description: Design specification for building CLI tools that AI agents can safely use, covering structured JSON output, error handling, input contracts, safety guardrails, exit codes, and agent self-description.
trigger_conditions: Building a new CLI tool that AI agents will invoke
Retrofitting an existing CLI to be agent-friendly
Designing command-line interfaces for automation pipelines
Auditing a CLI tool's compliance with agent-safety standards
anti_triggers: CLI tools without structured JSON output
CLIs that prompt for missing input interactively

skills.description: Automates the creation of new CLI skills following Anthropic's best practices with zero manual configuration, including brainstorming, template application, validation, and installation processes.
trigger_conditions: User wants to extend CLI functionality with custom capabilities
User needs to create a skill following official standards
User wants to automate repetitive CLI tasks with a reusable skill
User needs to package domain knowledge into a skill format
User wants both local and global skill installation options
anti_triggers: Creating skills without following Anthropic's best practices
Manually configuring each step of the skill creation process

skills.description: A comprehensive workflow for creating, improving and updating agent skills following the Agent Skills specification.
trigger_conditions: Asked to create or update skills
Skill improvement required based on outcomes/examples
anti_triggers: Purely theoretical tasks without practical implementation
